zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Eure於1418年出生時，她的父親Sir William Eure32歲，母親Maude FitzHugh24歲。她於大約1438年與Sir John Hotham VII在英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1470年3月16日享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Eure于1418年出生时，她的父亲Sir William Eure32岁，母亲Maude FitzHugh24岁。她于大约1438年与Sir John Hotham VII在英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1470年3月16日享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Eure was born in 1418, her father, Sir William Eure, was 32 and her mother, Maude FitzHugh, was 24. She married Sir John Hotham VII about 1438, in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 16 March 1470, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Eure est née en 1418, son père, Sir William Eure, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maude FitzHugh, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hotham VII environ 1438, à Old Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1470, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Eure 1418 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Eure 32 und ihre Mutter Maude FitzHugh 24. Sie hat um 1438 in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England Sir John Hotham VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. März 1470 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eure è nata il nel 1418, sua padre, Sir William Eure, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maude FitzHugh, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hotham VII circa 1438, nel Old Malton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 16 marzo 1470, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eureが1418年に生まれた時，父Sir William Eureは32歳，母Maude FitzHughは24歳であった。約1438年にイギリスヨークシュアイアオルド マルトンでSir John Hotham VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1470年3月16日に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eure(이)가 1418년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Eure(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude FitzHugh(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1438년 영국 요르크실르 드 맬턴에서 Sir John Hotham VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 3월 16일 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eure nasceu em 1418, seu pai, Sir William Eure, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maude FitzHugh, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hotham VII aproximadamente 1438, em Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1470, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Eure родилась в 1418 г., её отцу по имени Sir William Eure было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maude FitzHugh, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hotham VII около 1438 г. в местности олд малтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 16 марта 1470 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Eure nació en 1418, su papá, Sir William Eure, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maude FitzHugh, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Hotham VII aproximadamente 1438, en Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1470, a la edad de 52 años.
